behavior_summary: Provides inspect ('U8P_PLAQUENS::look') and use behavior for a plaque object: a short one-line label is emitted on U8P_PLAQUENS::look, and a detailed read flow is launched on use.
PLAQUENS::look emits a short label by calling Item::bark with the literal "plaque " directed at the viewer/process that triggered the U8P_PLAQUENS::look.
PLAQUENS::use does not print text directly; it spawns a dedicated read routine (PLAQUENS::00C2) to handle selection and display of the plaque's full inscription.

U8P_PLAQUENS::00C2 queries the plaque's numeric variant via Item::getQuality(), switches on that variant to pick one of many hard-coded inscription strings, and calls Plaque::read with a display flag (0x10) to present the chosen inscription.
A small number of plaque variants consult global flags (acolyteKilled, goToInnerSanctum) to choose alternate inscriptions, making the displayed text conditional on game state.
After invoking Plaque::read the read routine yields/suspends so the player can read the text (synchronous reading experience).
notable_control_flow: Look handler (U8P_PLAQUENS::look) performs a simple call to Item::bark and then returns/suspends.
Use handler (U8P_PLAQUENS::use) spawns an independent read process U8P_PLAQUENS::00C2 rather than printing inline, isolating the read logic in its own process.

U8P_PLAQUENS::00C2 performs a switch/case on the local 'quality' value (Item::getQuality result) to select inscription text; a few cases further branch on global flags (acolyteKilled, goToInnerSanctum).
Calling Plaque::read is followed by a suspend/wait, implying the spawned process halts until the player finishes reading.
open_questions: Exact mapping of numeric quality values to all concrete inscription strings (the disassembly shows selection but the full set and exact strings would confirm content).
Precise meaning/semantics of the Plaque::read flag value 0x10 (display mode, UI flags, or read-only marker) — inferred but not explicit.
Whether additional global flags (beyond acolyteKilled and goToInnerSanctum) influence other, less-common plaque variants — only two flags were observed being read.
Exact event numbers that map to higher-level player actions in the engine (e.g., which event ID corresponds to 'use' vs other interactions) — inferred from context but not enumerated here.

main_function.name: U8P_PLAQUENS::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player's 'U8P_PLAQUENS::look' (inspect) interaction with a plaque by preparing object/process context and emitting a one-line label for the plaque (calls Item::bark with "plaque ").
entry_conditions: Triggered when an actor/player inspects or 'looks' at the plaque (the script's 'U8P_PLAQUENS::look' event).

function_map.name: U8P_PLAQUENS::look
function_map.role: Responds to the 'U8P_PLAQUENS::look' event: sets object/process info and calls Item::bark to emit the short label 'plaque '.

function_map.name: U8P_PLAQUENS::use
function_map.role: Responds to the 'use' event: sets up context and spawns U8P_PLAQUENS::00C2 to perform the detailed read/display flow.

function_map.name: U8P_PLAQUENS::00C2
function_map.role: Spawned read routine: obtains plaque variant via Item::getQuality, selects the inscription text (with a switch and occasional checks of global flags), calls Plaque::read to show the text, then suspends to allow reading.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item routine used to emit a short message/label for an item/process (used by U8P_PLAQUENS::look to show 'plaque ').

function_map.name: Item::getQuality
function_map.role: Engine/item routine returning a numeric quality/variant id for an item; drives inscription selection in the read routine.

function_map.name: Plaque::read
function_map.role: Engine/UI routine that presents the plaque's full inscription text to the player; called with a display flag (0x10) and the chosen text.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn an independent read/display process to handle the plaque inscription instead of performing it inline.

external_calls.purpose: Emit a short one-line label/utterance ('plaque ') to the viewer/process that inspected the plaque.
Retrieve the plaque's variant id/quality used to select which inscription to display.
Present the chosen inscription text to the player (called with flags 0x10 and then the routine suspends to allow reading).

reads.name: acolyteKilled
reads.likely_effect: Gates alternate inscription text for certain plaque variants (used to pick between two possible strings).

reads.name: goToInnerSanctum
reads.likely_effect: Combined with acolyteKilled in some cases to determine character/location-specific plaque text; affects inscription selection.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides inspect ('U8P_PLAQUENS::look') and use behavior for a plaque object: a short one-line label is emitted on U8P_PLAQUENS::look, and a detailed read flow is launched on use.
